mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql002 */ RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_OCO_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_OCO_SASHINE, A.DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN AS DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN, A.DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND AS DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN, A.DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE AS DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_SASHINE, A.DONE_SASINARI_KBN AS DONE_SASINARI_KBN, A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.OCO_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS OCO_SASHINE, A.OCO_SASINARI_KBN AS OCO_SASINARI_KBN, A.RBE_ORDER_KIND AS RBE_ORDER_KIND, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.TRIGGER_PRICE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS TRIGGER_PRICE, A.TRIGGER_ZONE AS TRIGGER_ZONE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, A.TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_KBN, A.MARKET AS MARKET, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.PRICE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS PRICE, A.SASINARI_KBN AS SASINARI_KBN, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.QUANTITY,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS QUANTITY, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, A.ORDER_SYUBETSU AS ORDER_SYUBETSU, A.BRAND_CD AS BRAND_CD, A.AZUKARI_KBN AS AZUKARI_KBN, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM T_JP_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE A.TRADE_KBN IN ('1', '2') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND ((TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%')) ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql003 */ A.DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN AS DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_OCO_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_OCO_SASHINE, A.DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND AS DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN, A.DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE AS DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE, A.DONE_SASINARI_KBN AS DONE_SASINARI_KBN, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DONE_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS DONE_SASHINE, A.OCO_SASINARI_KBN AS OCO_SASINARI_KBN, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.OCO_SASHINE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS OCO_SASHINE, A.RBE_ORDER_KIND AS RBE_ORDER_KIND, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.TRIGGER_PRICE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS TRIGGER_PRICE, A.TRIGGER_ZONE AS TRIGGER_ZONE, A.MARKET AS MARKET, A.SASINARI_KBN AS SASINARI_KBN, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(A.PRICE,'0'),'999,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS PRICE, A.TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_KBN, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.QUANTITY,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS QUANTITY, A.ORDER_SYUBETSU AS ORDER_SYUBETSU, A.BRAND_CD AS BRAND_CD, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, A.PAYMENT_LIMIT AS PAYMENT_LIMIT, A.DAILY_CREDIT_KBN AS DAILY_CREDIT_KBN, DECODE(TRIM(A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE), '', A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE))) AS PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, A.DATE_KBN AS DATE_KBN, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_PRICE/100,'9,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS OPEN_PRICE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TRIM(C.OPEN_TRADE_DATE),'yyyymmdd'),'YYYY/MM/DD') AS OPEN_TRADE_DATE FROM T_JP_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN J_ORDER_POSITION_LINK C ON A.IFA_ORDER_NO = C.IFA_ORDER_NO WHERE A.TRADE_KBN IN ('3', '4', '5', '6') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND ((TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%')) ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql004 */ A.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO ,A.TOIAWASE_MEI ,A.TOIAWASE_S_MEI ,TO_CHAR(A.TOIAWASE_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOIAWASE_NICHIJI ,A.TAIOU_STS ,A.TOIAWASE_NAIYOU ,NVL(A.USER_NAME, '-') AS USER_NM ,A.ANS_IFA_TOIAWASE_NO FROM ( SELECT A.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO ,A.TOIAWASE_MEI ,A.TOIAWASE_S_MEI ,A.TOIAWASE_NICHIJI ,A.TAIOU_STS ,A.TOIAWASE_NAIYOU ,A.USER_NAME ,B.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO AS ANS_IFA_TOIAWASE_NO ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO ORDER BY B.KAITOU_NICHIJI) AS IFA_ANS_EXIST FROM CORDYS.TB_QUESTION_IFA A LEFT JOIN CORDYS.TB_ANSWER_IFA B ON A.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO = B.IFA_TOIAWASE_NO WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.TOIAWASE_NO IS NOT NULL ) A WHERE A.IFA_ANS_EXIST = 1 ORDER BY A.TOIAWASE_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql005 */ A.SHORUI_BUNRUI_MEI AS SHORUI_BUNRUI_MEI, TO_CHAR(A.STS_SENI_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STS_SENI_NICHIJI, A.HASSOU_STS AS HASSOU_STS, A.SHORUIMEI AS SHORUIMEI, A.RIYUU_CD AS RIYUU_CD, A.NAIYOU AS NAIYOU, A.BIKOU AS BIKOU, TRIM(A.MOKURONMISHO_NO) AS MOKURONMISHO_NO, A.SHORUI_SEIKYUU_NO AS SHORUI_SEIKYUU_NO, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_REQUEST_PAPERS_IFA A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.SHORUI_SEIKYUU_NO >= 1 AND A.TORIKESHI_KBN IN (0, 2) AND A.SAKUJO_FLG = 0 AND A.HASSOU_STS <> '04' ORDER BY A.STS_SENI_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql006 */ TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOUROKU_NICHIJI, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.KINGAKU, '999,999,999,990')) AS KINGAKU, TO_CHAR(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, DECODE(TRIM(A.KEIJOUBI), NULL, NULL, SUBSTR(RTRIM(A.KEIJOUBI),1,2)||'/'||SUBSTR(RTRIM(A.KEIJOUBI),3)) AS KEIJOUBI, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_CASH_PAY_REC_JOURNAL_IFA A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.HACCHUU_KBN = 'P' AND A.FURIKAE_KBN = '3 ' AND A.TORIKESHI_STS_CD = '0' AND A.STS_CD = '1' ORDER BY A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql007 */ TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOUROKU_NICHIJI, A.KINGAKU AS KINGAKU, TO_CHAR(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, A.KEIJOUBI AS KEIJOUBI, A.EC_NYUSHUKKIN_NO AS EC_NYUSHUKKIN_NO, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_CASH_PAY_REC_JOURNAL_IFA A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.HACCHUU_KBN = 'P' AND A.FURIKAE_KBN = '3 ' AND A.TORIKESHI_STS_CD = '1' ORDER BY A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql008 */ D.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, D.CREATE_TIME_YMD || '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY D.CREATE_TIME_YMD ORDER BY D.CREATE_TIME ASC,D.USER_NM ASC) AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, D.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, D.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT MIN(C.CREATE_TIME) AS CREATE_TIME, C.CREATE_TIME_YMD AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, C.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, C.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(TJO.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(TJO.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, TJO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM T_JP_ORDER TJO LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON TJO.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE TJO.TRADE_KBN IN ('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8') AND TJO.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND TJO.ORDER_STATUS = '0' AND ((TRIM(TJO.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND TJO.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(TJO.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND TJO.CODE LIKE 'W%')) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TJO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TJO.CREATE_USER, B.USER_NM UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(JTO.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(JTO.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, JTO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM JP_TOUSHIN_ORDER JTO LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON JTO.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE TRIM(JTO.TRADE_TYPE) IN ('0', '1', '3', '4', '6', '7', '8', '10') AND JTO.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND JTO.ORDER_STATUS = '0' AND ((TRIM(JTO.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND JTO.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(JTO.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND JTO.CODE LIKE 'W%')) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(JTO.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), JTO.CREATE_USER, B.USER_NM UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(TAOI.TOUROKU_NICHIJI), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(TAOI.TOUROKU_NICHIJI), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, TAOI.USER_ID AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_ADDITIONAL_ORDER_IFA TAOI LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON TAOI.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE TAOI.HATTYUU_KBN = '3' AND TAOI.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND TAOI.EDABAN = '1' AND TAOI.STS_CD = '1' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TAOI.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TAOI.USER_ID, B.USER_NM )C GROUP BY C.CREATE_TIME_YMD, C.CREATE_USER, C.USER_NM ORDER BY MIN(C.CREATE_TIME) DESC, C.USER_NM ASC )D WHERE ROWNUM <= '100'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql011 */ C.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, C.CREATE_TIME_YMD || '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY C.CREATE_TIME_YMD ORDER BY C.CREATE_TIME ASC,C.USER_NM ASC) AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, C.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, C.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, A.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT FCO.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, FCO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, FCO.API_ERROR_CODE AS API_ERROR_CODE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO WHERE FCO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND FCO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND FCO.ORDER_TYPE = '0' AND FCO.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 UNION SELECT FCOH.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, FCOH.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, FCOH.API_ERROR_CODE AS API_ERROR_CODE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER_HIS FCOH WHERE FCOH.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND FCOH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND FCOH.ORDER_TYPE = '0' AND FCOH.API_STATUS_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 )A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID GROUP BY TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CREATE_USER, B.USER_NM ORDER BY MIN(A.CREATE_TIME) DESC, B.USER_NM ASC )C WHERE ROWNUM <= '100'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql012 */ C.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, C.CREATE_TIME_YMD || '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY C.CREATE_TIME_YMD ORDER BY C.CREATE_TIME ASC,C.USER_NM ASC) AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, C.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, C.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, A.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TCO.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, TCO.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER TCO WHERE TCO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TCO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} UNION SELECT TCOH.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, TCOH.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER_HIS TCOH WHERE TCOH.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TCOH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} )A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID GROUP BY TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CREATE_USER, B.USER_NM ORDER BY MIN(A.CREATE_TIME) DESC, B.USER_NM ASC )C WHERE ROWNUM <= '100'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql013 */ C.CREATE_TIME AS CREATE_TIME, C.CREATE_TIME_YMD || '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY C.CREATE_TIME_YMD ORDER BY C.CREATE_TIME ASC,C.USER_NM ASC) AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, C.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, C.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(MIN(A.CREATE_TIME), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_TIME_YMD, A.CREATE_USER AS CREATE_USER, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM EXCHANGE_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber} AND A.FX_ORDER_STATUS = '0' AND A.API_STATUS_CODE IS NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CREATE_USER, B.USER_NM ORDER BY MIN(A.CREATE_TIME) DESC, B.USER_NM ASC )C WHERE ROWNUM <= '100'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql015 */ A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.QUANTITY,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS QUANTITY, A.SPECIFIC_KBN AS SPECIFIC_KBN, A.BRAND_CD AS BRAND_CD, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, A.TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_KBN, A.PAYMENT_LIMIT AS PAYMENT_LIMIT, A.DAILY_CREDIT_KBN AS DAILY_CREDIT_KBN, DECODE(TRIM(A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE), '', A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE))) AS PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, A.DATE_KBN AS DATE_KBN, A.AZUKARI_KBN AS AZUKARI_KBN, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM, RTRIM(RTRIM(TRIM(TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_PRICE/100,'9,999,999,999,990.99')),'0'),'.') AS OPEN_PRICE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TRIM(C.OPEN_TRADE_DATE),'yyyymmdd'),'YYYY/MM/DD') AS OPEN_TRADE_DATE, C.OPEN_MARKET AS OPEN_MARKET FROM T_JP_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN J_ORDER_POSITION_LINK C ON A.IFA_ORDER_NO = C.IFA_ORDER_NO WHERE A.TRADE_KBN IN ('7', '8') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND ((TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%')) ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql016 */ A.FUND_CD_KAISU AS FUND_CD_KAISU, TRIM(A.FUND_CD_GOU) AS FUND_CD_GOU, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.QUANTITY,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS QUANTITY, A.NORIKAE_YUGU_KBN AS NORIKAE_YUGU_KBN, A.TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_KBN, A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, A.SPECIFIC_KBN AS SPECIFIC_KBN, A.AZUKARI_KBN AS AZUKARI_KBN, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM JP_TOUSHIN_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE TRIM(A.TRADE_TYPE) IN ('0', '3', '7') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND ((TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%')) ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql017 */ TRIM(A.FUND_CD_GOU) AS FUND_CD_GOU, A.FUND_CD_KAISU AS FUND_CD_KAISU, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.POINT,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS POINT, A.POINT_TYPE AS POINT_TYPE, A.NORIKAE_YUGU_KBN AS NORIKAE_YUGU_KBN, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_TYPE, A.TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_KBN, A.ORDER_STATUS AS ORDER_STATUS, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.NET_AMOUNT,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS NET_AMOUNT, A.AZUKARI_KBN AS AZUKARI_KBN, A.SPECIFIC_KBN AS SPECIFIC_KBN, A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM JP_TOUSHIN_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.CREATE_USER = B.USER_ID WHERE TRIM(A.TRADE_TYPE) IN ('1', '4', '6', '8', '10') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerId} AND ((TRIM(A.SHUBETU) IS NULL AND A.SHUBETU IS NOT NULL) OR (TRIM(A.SHUBETU) = 'APL' AND A.CODE LIKE 'W%')) ORDER BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO DESC, A.CREATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql018 */ A.TRAN_ID AS TRAN_ID, A.TORIKESHI_KBN AS TORIKESHI_KBN, A.KOUSOKU_KBN AS KOUSOKU_KBN, A.KOUSOKU_SYUBETU AS KOUSOKU_SYUBETU, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.NISA_KINGAKU,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS NISA_KINGAKU, A.EDABAN AS EDABAN, A.TOKUTEI_AZUKARI_BAIBAI_KBN AS TOKUTEI_AZUKARI_BAIBAI_KBN, TRIM(A.HATTYU_RIYU) AS HATTYU_RIYU, TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOUROKU_NICHIJI, TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.SEISAN_KINGAKU,'999,999,999,999,990')) AS SEISAN_KINGAKU, NVL(B.USER_NM, '-') AS USER_NM FROM TB_ADDITIONAL_ORDER_IFA A LEFT JOIN TB_MED_USERS B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.HATTYUU_KBN = '3' AND A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.customerId} AND A.STS_CD = '1' ORDER BY A.TRAN_ID DESC, A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql019 */ RTRIM(B.CONTENT) AS CONTENT ,RTRIM(B.RECORD_DATE) AS RECORD_DATE FROM CORDYS.TB_CASH_PAY_REC_JOURNAL_IFA A INNER JOIN JSON_TABLE( TO_CLOB(#{req.ccsApiRtnVal}), '$[*]' COLUMNS( CONTENT VARCHAR2(500) PATH '$[0]', RECORD_DATE VARCHAR2(20) PATH '$[1]' ) ) B ON TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') = RTRIM(B.RECORD_DATE) AND ( NVL2(A.KINGAKU, '出金額:' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.KINGAKU, '999,999,999,990')) || ' ', '') || NVL2(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, '出金予定日:' || TO_CHAR(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ', '') || NVL2(A.KEIJOUBI, '計上日:'||DECODE(TRIM(A.KEIJOUBI), NULL, NULL, SUBSTR(RTRIM(A.KEIJOUBI),1,2)||'/'||SUBSTR(RTRIM(A.KEIJOUBI),3)) || ' ', '') || '振替区分:銀行振込(送金)' ) = REGEXP_REPLACE(B.CONTENT, '[ ]+$') WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.kokyakuId} AND A.HACCHUU_KBN = 'P' AND A.FURIKAE_KBN = '3 ' AND A.TORIKESHI_STS_CD = '0' AND A.STS_CD = '1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql020 */ RTRIM(B.CONTENT) AS CONTENT ,RTRIM(B.RECORD_DATE) AS RECORD_DATE FROM CORDYS.TB_CASH_PAY_REC_JOURNAL_IFA A INNER JOIN JSON_TABLE( TO_CLOB(#{req.ccsApiRtnVal}), '$[*]' COLUMNS( CONTENT VARCHAR2(500) PATH '$[0]', RECORD_DATE VARCHAR2(20) PATH '$[1]' ) ) B ON TO_CHAR(A.TOUROKU_NICHIJI, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') = RTRIM(B.RECORD_DATE) AND ( A.EC_NYUSHUKKIN_NO || ' ' || NVL2(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, '出金予定日:' || TO_CHAR(A.SHUKKIN_YOTEIBI, 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ', '') || '振替区分:銀行振込(送金)' ) = REGEXP_REPLACE(B.CONTENT, '[ ]+$') WHERE A.KOKYAKU_ID = #{req.kokyakuId} AND A.HACCHUU_KBN = 'P' AND A.FURIKAE_KBN = '3 ' AND A.TORIKESHI_STS_CD = '1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql021 */ A.IFA_ORDER_NO AS IFA_ORDER_NO, TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(A.POINT),'999,999,999,999,990')) AS POINT, TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(A.NET_AMOUNT),'999,999,999,999,990')) AS NET_AMOUNT FROM JP_TOUSHIN_ORDER A GROUP BY A.IFA_ORDER_NO

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_1#Sql022 */ A.TRAN_ID AS TRAN_ID, TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(A.NISA_KINGAKU),'999,999,999,999,990')) AS NISA_KINGAKU, TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(A.SEISAN_KINGAKU),'999,999,999,999,990')) AS SEISAN_KINGAKU FROM TB_ADDITIONAL_ORDER_IFA A GROUP BY A.TRAN_ID
